Autopilot key rename from old names (Bug query, Stop on error, Lock file) to canonical names (On error, Bug limit, etc.) may be detected as breaking by this regression test — needs investigation

semantic_ambiguities_resolved.Bug_limit_0_and_Feature_limit_0: 0 means no per-type cap — only Max issues per run (total cap) applies. This is consistent with roadmap line 634 which lists 'Bug limit (0), Feature limit (0)' without specifying 'disabled'. The total cap (Max issues per run, default 1) serves as the only limiting mechanism when per-type limits are 0.
semantic_ambiguities_resolved.Bug_query_and_Feature_query_ownership: These keys are NOT in the Autopilot section. Bug query lives in Issue Tracker (required). Feature query lives in Feature Workflow (optional). Autopilot only reads them — it does not define them.
semantic_ambiguities_resolved.Lock_vs_Log_distinction: Lock directory is .ceos-agents/autopilot.lock/ (mkdir-based, separate from Log file). Log file is .ceos-agents/autopilot.log (append-only text log). These are different artifacts.
